title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, 25-year-old co-founders of Corgi, raised $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy carriers. Their approach of questioning industry defaults and pursuing the most ambitious version of their vision created a multi-year competitive moat despite facing regulatory challenges and near-failure multiple times.
